query:
WITH ins_scope AS (
            INSERT INTO scopes (scope, creator) VALUES ($1, $2)
            RETURNING scope, description, creator, package_limit, new_package_per_week_limit, publish_attempts_per_week_limit, verify_oidc_actor, require_publishing_from_ci, updated_at, created_at
        ),
        ins_member AS (
            INSERT INTO scope_members (scope, user_id, is_admin)
            VALUES ($1, $2, true)
        )
        SELECT scope as "scope: ScopeName", description as "description: ScopeDescription", creator, package_limit, new_package_per_week_limit, publish_attempts_per_week_limit, verify_oidc_actor, require_publishing_from_ci, updated_at, created_at FROM ins_scope
